events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: heat trace work, rough-complete stage, observed field condition is "no GFPE breaker." NEC 427 requires ground-fault protection for electric heat tracing (specifically 427.22). Missing GFPE breaker is a non-compliance defect. Decision should be fail because non-compliant. Risk: high or critical - missing ground fault protection on heat trace is a fire/electrical hazard. Percent complete: 70 as stated. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Findings: no GFPE breaker installed. Actions: install GFPE breaker. References: NEC 427.22.
